title: Visual Regression Audit
description: 20-point QA checklist — all PASS: unified tokens (11/11), no sub-12px fonts (0 violations), unified nav (11/11), 44px tap targets (11/11), focus-visible (11/11), skip-nav (11/11), reduced-motion (11/11), smooth scroll (11/11), skeletons (11/11), border-radius tokens (116+ uses), 8px spacing (123+ uses), transition tokens (15+ uses), table scroll indicators (11/11), breakpoints consolidated (0 ad-hoc), WCAG AA contrast fix, elevation system in MC, Orbitron/Space Grotesk in MC, ARIA on nav (11/11), container-max (11/11), no iOS blue in MC. Target UX score >= A-.

florentino_gate.reason: UX overhaul is critical path for product quality. Approved per TKT-159 audit findings.

2026-02-28T12:00:00Z.detail: Implemented as part of StatsLedge UX Overhaul (TKT-267 through TKT-280). All 20 QA checks pass.
